sections.section_job: Lead with the line that melts a parent: before you were even born, God loved you first.
sections.voice_anchor: before you were even born, god loved you first
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Forced enthusiasm or saccharine kid-ministry cliches ('Your kids will LOVE it!'). Keep it quiet, true, and tender.

sections.section_job: Reassure parents the room is safe, the rhythm is loving, and they are not alone — including a Parents Room to breathe.
sections.voice_anchor: Let delight show up in the details. Do not force enthusiasm.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Don't oversell safety with security-theater language; don't perform warmth. Let the details (stories, songs, play, the Parents Room) carry it.

atom_assignments.drafter_hint: Use the 'delight shows up in the details' voice rule as the heading's tonal anchor; do not quote the rule itself.
Stories + songs item — one card on the rhythm of the room.
Parents Room card — 'somewhere to breathe' framing.

sections.section_job: Logistics: ages 0-4, Saturdays 9:15, Teacher Donna coordinating.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Don't bury the time/age/coordinator in prose. Parents scan this section — make the facts findable.

atom_assignments.drafter_hint: Short logistics heading; tone-anchored, not flat 'Details'.
Weave service time (Saturdays 9:15, ages 0-4, 51 W Olive) into one warm paragraph — pull from facts: 631e87bd, e3a0634e.
When + Where item — use fact 631e87bd (Saturday 9:15 AM, 51 W Olive).
Who it's for + Teacher Donna item — use fact 1ac6eab1 (Donna Hadley, founding member, mother of Pastor Craig); include info@paradoxredlands.com.

sections.section_job: Invite: come at 9:15, then stay for the 10:00 gathering together.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Don't pressure or over-promise. One clear action; no 'don't miss out' language.

atom_assignments.drafter_hint: Warm invite heading — 'Come at 9:15. Stay for 10:00.' or similar.
Two-sentence body: ParaTots starts at 9:15, then the whole family gathers at 10:00. Reference fact 631e87bd for time/location.
Primary CTA label: 'Plan a Visit' or 'Bring Your Kids Saturday'.

sections.section_job: Close on solidarity: we are all in this mystery of parenting together.
sections.voice_anchor: Kids are loud in the lobby and welcome to be.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Don't moralize parenting or use performative 'village' cliches. Quiet solidarity, not slogans.

atom_assignments.drafter_hint: Solidarity close — 'We're in this together' tone, anchored by the generous/inclusive/affirming line.
Honest, unsentimental body: parenting under-5s is a mystery; you don't have to do it alone; questions welcome.
CTA label: 'Email Teacher Donna' — pull email from fact 1ac6eab1 (info@paradoxredlands.com).

unresolved_inputs.what: Fact rows for service_time (631e87bd), program (e3a0634e), staff (1ac6eab1), and ministry (b6dc9d7d) were provided in the allocation but are not present as content_atoms in the project inventory — the validator rejects them as atom_refs. Drafter must weave these fact values (Saturdays 9:15 AM, ages 0-4, 51 W Olive Redlands, Donna Hadley / Teacher Donna, info@paradoxredlands.com) directly from the allocation's facts_for_page list rather than via atom_ref.
